nasb.text: Jesus answered him, “It is written, ‘You shall worship the Lord your God and serve Him only.’ ”

esv.text: And Jesus answered him, “It is written, “‘You shall worship the Lord your God, and     him only shall you serve.’”

cnv.text: 耶穌回答：“經上記著： ‘當拜主你的　神， 單要事奉他。’”

ccb.text: 耶稣回答说：“圣经上说，‘要敬拜主——你的上帝，单单事奉祂。’”

csbs.text: 耶稣回答说：“经上记着： ‘要敬拜主——你的神， 唯独事奉他。’      ”
